decisions.decision: No new implementation code needed — rate_limit_headers() at server.py:682-707 already builds all four X-RateLimit-* headers (Limit, Remaining, Reset, Policy) and handle_api() at server.py:4597-4612 already applies them to both success (<400) and 429 responses on all rate-limited write endpoints.
alternatives_rejected: Rewrite or extend rate_limit_headers() — unnecessary since it already covers all required headers
Add middleware/decorator approach — unnecessary since handle_api() already handles it centrally

decisions.decision: No additional test coverage needed — the breadth test at test_bayes_market_api.py:6888 already covers all 5 existing rate-limited POST routes (create-market, probability-edit, market-resolve, comment-post, event-trade). Close/reopen endpoints do not exist in this codebase.
alternatives_rejected: Add tests for close/reopen endpoints — these routes do not exist per resolve_write_route_category() at server.py:551-571

decisions.decision: Include X-RateLimit-Policy as a fourth header in scope — it is part of the existing contract, already implemented and tested. Removing it would be a regression.
alternatives_rejected: Strip Policy header to match the 3-header task description — would break existing contract and tests

decisions.decision: Keep conditional header emission behavior (headers only when RATE_LIMIT_PER_MIN > 0 AND agent_id is non-empty) — this is deliberately designed and explicitly tested.
alternatives_rejected: Always emit headers even when rate limiting is disabled — contradicts existing design and test expectations

steps.task: Run existing rate-limit header test suite to verify all tests pass: python -m pytest tests/test_bayes_market_api.py -k 'rate_limit_header' -v
Verify the 5 rate-limited routes in resolve_write_route_category() match the 5 routes tested in test_protected_post_routes_emit_rate_limit_headers_on_first_success — confirm no coverage gaps.
If steps 1-2 confirm full coverage with all tests passing, mark task as complete with no code changes. If any gap is found, create a targeted fix (unlikely based on research).

decomposition_assessment.decision_reason: The feature is already fully implemented and tested. All steps are verification-only with 0 estimated lines of code change. No high-risk steps, total estimated lines well below 500, and only one parallelizable group. This is a validation task, not an implementation task.
